title: Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams
description: Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams, a server-side Touhou Project mod.
body:
![NEED TRANSLATE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/translate/generic-singular_vector.svg)

# 🌙 Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams

**Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams (梦隐的幻想乡 / 夢見る幻想郷)** is a Touhou Project–inspired mod featuring danmaku combat, unique dimensions, and a custom content ecosystem.

---

## ⚠️ Important Changes

> ❗ This mod is **no longer a purely server-side mod by default**.

To enable **server-side-only gameplay**, you must now install a separate compatibility patch:

👉 **Polymer Patch (Fabric only):**
[Polymer Patch For Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer-patch-for-gensokyo-reverie-of-lost-dreams?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

---

## 🔖 Platform & Compatibility

* ✅ **Fabric supported**
* ✅ **NeoForge supported**
* 🔄 **Server-side mode available via Polymer Patch (Fabric only)**
* ⚠️ **Polymer ecosystem is Fabric-only**

> 💡 To run this mod as a **server-side-only experience**, install:
>
> * Polymer
> * Polymer Patch (linked above)
> * (Optional) Polymerify

---

## ⚠️ Resource Pack Requirement (Polymer Patch)

When using Polymer:

📦 A **server resource pack is required**

Setup guide:
[Polymer Resource Pack Hosting Guide](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

---

## 🔖 Important Notes

* ⚠️ **Client installation may be required** depending on your setup
* ✅ Fully compatible with **Polymer (server-side) environments**
* 🔄 Compatible with recipe viewers:

  * **JEI**
  * **REI**
  * **Polydex** *(requires polydex2rei bridge)*
* ❌ **Bukkit + Fabric hybrid servers are NOT supported**
* 🌏 **Translations are incomplete**

---

## 🌏 Translation Status

Priority order:

1. Simplified Chinese (简体中文)
2. Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)
3. English
4. Japanese

---

## ✨ Features

> Non-exhaustive list of current features:

### ✅ Available Now

* 🎣 Fishing system overhaul
* 🔫 Danmaku-style combat system
* 🧱 Custom workstations & factory blocks
* 🏮 Touhou-themed items and decorations
* 🌍 Moon & Dream World dimensions
* 🍳 Custom cooking system *(inspired by Mystia’s Izakaya)*
* 🧾 Built-in recipe viewer (**no JEI/EMI required**)
* 🧍‍♀️ Recruitable Touhou companions
* 🔮 Crafting altar system for progression

---

## 💻 Commands

| Command          | Description                |
| ---------------- | -------------------------- |
| `/touhou help`   | Show help and commands     |
| `/touhou recipe` | Open recipe browser        |
| `/touhou about`  | Display mod info & credits |

---

## 📌 Legal & Credits

This is a **fan-made project** inspired by:

* *Touhou Project* — 上海アリス幻樂団 (**ZUN**)
* *Touhou: Mystia’s Izakaya*

---

## 📁 Resource Usage (借物表)

1. **77 Skin Pack (source lost)**
   → Touhou character skins

2. **Totem of Fumo - Fan Expansion (Authorized)**
   → https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/totem-of-fumo-a-fan-made-expansion/

3. **Marisa Kirisame’s Hat by Dr Latency (OptiFine)**
   → https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/marisa-kirisame-s-hat-optifine/

4. **Partial in-game OSTs**
   → Credits available in item descriptions

---

## 🚀 Summary

* ✔ Supports **Fabric & NeoForge**
* ✔ Supports **server-side mode via Polymer Patch**
* ⚠️ Polymer-related features are **Fabric-only**
* ❗ No longer a pure server-side mod by default

---
